title.rendered: Johnny Mac and the Faithful: Across the Border

content.rendered:
Johnny Mac and The Faithful are a Glasgow-based celtic-folk-rock band that count the music of Bruce Springsteen and Woody Guthrie among their primary influences, so it’s no surprise that when they decided to cover Bruce they turned to his most Guthrie-esque album.

Their cover of “Across the Border” does more than justice to Bruce’s original. Lead singer John Mclaughlin’s vocals are gorgeous, and the group’s arrangement is hopeful and expansive. This is a splendid cover.

And not that this has anything to do with the song, but does Johnny Mac bear an uncanny resemblance to The Boss himself, or what?

© February 1, 2021

excerpt.rendered: Glasgow-based Johnny Mac and The Faithful gift us with a beautiful cover of Bruce’s “Across the Border.”

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me: Ring of Fire
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Traditional, slow-grooving, or hard-rocking, they're all great: check out Bruce's three very different covers of Johnny Cash's "Ring of Fire" spanning five decades.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Hard Travelin’
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Bruce helped launch the American Music Masters series by leading an all-star encore of one of Woody Guthrie's most-recorded songs.

jetpack-related-posts.title: August 16
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: On this date: Earth makes their public debut, Bruce premieres "Sea Cruise," "It's Gonna Work Out Fine," the first full-band "Across the Border," and more.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Down in the Valley
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: One time only: Bruce covers Solomon Burke's country soul classic with Southside Johnny and The Asbury Jukes in 1977.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me: Long Black Veil
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Lefty Frizzell's 1959 tale of a falsely accused man who accepts his sentence rather than confess his secret was a natural temptation for a Bruce Springsteen cover treatment. Watch one of its frequent outings on Bruce's 2006 Seeger Sessions Tour inside.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Shovels & Rope: Johnny 99
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Love it or hate it, Shovels & Rope certainly captures the bravado and unraveling desperation of Bruce's classic anti-hero.
